user_query: I'm a Minecraft enthusiast and I want to know if there are any blocklists available for preventing mod reposting. Can you fetch the ublacklist.txt, hosts.txt, plain text, YAML, XML, and JSON versions of the blocklist?

TaskList.description: Fetch the ublacklist.txt version of the blocklist.
Fetch the hosts.txt version of the blocklist.
Fetch the plain text version of the blocklist.
Fetch the YAML version of the blocklist.
Fetch the XML version of the blocklist.
Fetch the JSON version of the blocklist.
